items.name: Shih Tzu
items.desc_en: Gentle, affectionate and adaptable, with a beautiful flowing coat.
items.desc_zh: 温顺亲人、适应力强，拥有飘逸的被毛。
items.long_en: The Shih Tzu is a sweet, sociable companion with a flowing coat and an easygoing nature. Great with children and adaptable to apartment life, it simply loves to be with its people.
items.long_zh: 西施犬性情甜美、爱社交，拥有飘逸的被毛和随和的性格。对孩子友好、适应公寓生活，最爱与家人相伴。

items.name: Chow Chow
items.desc_en: Lion-like mane and a dignified, calm temperament. A timeless statement breed.
items.desc_zh: 狮子般的鬃毛，沉稳从容的气质。经典又有面子的犬种。
items.long_en: With its lion-like mane and signature blue-black tongue, the Chow Chow is one of China's most iconic breeds. Dignified and calm, it bonds deeply with its family and makes a striking, devoted companion.
items.long_zh: 松狮拥有狮子般的鬃毛和标志性的蓝黑色舌头，是中国最具代表性的犬种之一。沉稳冷静，与家人感情深厚，是气场十足又忠诚的伴侣。

items.name: Shar-Pei
items.desc_en: Unmistakable wrinkles and a loyal, protective nature. Instantly recognizable.
items.desc_zh: 标志性的褶皱皮肤，忠诚护主。一眼就能认出。
items.long_en: Instantly recognizable for its deep wrinkles and 'hippo' muzzle, the Shar-Pei is a calm, loyal guardian. Independent yet devoted, it is a low-energy, dignified companion that bonds closely with its people.
items.long_zh: 沙皮犬以深深的褶皱和“河马”般的嘴吻一眼可辨，性格冷静、忠诚护主。独立又黏主人，运动量不大、气质沉稳，与家人关系亲密。

items.name: Pekingese
items.desc_en: The lapdog of Chinese royalty — compact, affectionate and full of character.
items.desc_zh: 中国皇室的掌上犬——小巧、亲人、个性十足。
items.long_en: Bred for Chinese royalty, the Pekingese is a compact lapdog with a lion-like mane and a big personality. Affectionate, loyal and confident, it thrives as a pampered indoor companion.
items.long_zh: 京巴（北京犬）为中国皇室所培育，是有着狮子般鬃毛、个性十足的掌上犬。亲人、忠诚又自信，非常适合作为娇宠的室内伴侣。

items.name: Chongqing Dog
items.desc_en: An ancient, athletic Chinese breed seldom seen abroad — for the true collector.
items.desc_zh: 古老而矫健的中国本土犬种，海外罕见——献给真正的收藏者。
items.long_en: A rare, ancient breed seldom seen outside China, the Chongqing Dog is athletic, brave and intensely loyal. With its distinctive short coat and natural guarding instinct, it is a prize for the serious collector.
items.long_zh: 重庆犬是一种古老而稀有、在中国以外极少见的犬种，矫健、勇敢、极其忠诚。短而独特的被毛加上天生的护卫本能，是资深爱好者的珍藏之选。

items.name: Chinese Crested Dog
items.desc_en: Powder-puff style, fully covered in long, silky fur.
items.desc_zh: 粉扑款全身覆盖丝质长毛
items.long_en: The Chinese Crested Dog is an ancient, small toy breed originating in China. It is one of the few dog breeds that possesses sweat glands and can dissipate heat by sweating through its skin. Characterized by a slender, elegant physique and agile movement, it has a gentle, affectionate, and non-aggressive temperament, serving as both a companion and a small ornamental dog.
items.long_zh: 中国冠毛犬是源自中国的古老小型玩赏犬，它是少有的自带汗腺、可通过皮肤出汗散热的犬种，体态纤细优雅、动静灵动，性格温顺亲人，无攻击性，兼具伴侣陪伴与小型观赏犬属性。
